## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss video content strategy and deliverables for Metronome's upcoming white paper launch and ongoing marketing efforts.](https://fathom.video/share/zxzb4ty6fBrmzzEkkjk7in5VcLWj5RRR?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Priority: Create 3-5 high-quality video clips to embed in the white paper launching August 18th](https://fathom.video/share/zxzb4ty6fBrmzzEkkjk7in5VcLWj5RRR?tab=summary&timestamp=153.0)
  - [Produce 3 social media video clips per week, prioritizing LinkedIn, then X (Twitter), then YouTube](https://fathom.video/share/zxzb4ty6fBrmzzEkkjk7in5VcLWj5RRR?tab=summary&timestamp=310.0)
  - [Balance between quick, simple clips and more nuanced, high-quality content needed](https://fathom.video/share/zxzb4ty6fBrmzzEkkjk7in5VcLWj5RRR?tab=summary&timestamp=385.0)
  - [Future consideration: Educational-style content with visual explanations of complex concepts](https://fathom.video/share/zxzb4ty6fBrmzzEkkjk7in5VcLWj5RRR?tab=summary&timestamp=488.0)

## Topics

### White Paper Video Integration

  - [Launch date: August 18th (Monday)](https://fathom.video/share/zxzb4ty6fBrmzzEkkjk7in5VcLWj5RRR?tab=summary&timestamp=1463.0)
  - [3-5 embedded videos planned](https://fathom.video/share/zxzb4ty6fBrmzzEkkjk7in5VcLWj5RRR?tab=summary&timestamp=1488.0)
  - [Title: "The Monetization Operating Model: A Modern Approach to Pricing, Billing, and Growth in the AI Era"](https://fathom.video/share/zxzb4ty6fBrmzzEkkjk7in5VcLWj5RRR?tab=summary&timestamp=1732.0)
  - [Scott's interview content aligns well with white paper messaging](https://fathom.video/share/zxzb4ty6fBrmzzEkkjk7in5VcLWj5RRR?tab=summary&timestamp=1845.0)
  - [GrowthX to review white paper draft for video synchronization](https://fathom.video/share/zxzb4ty6fBrmzzEkkjk7in5VcLWj5RRR?tab=summary&timestamp=673.0)

### Social Media Content Strategy

  - [Aim for 3+ video clips per week](https://fathom.video/share/zxzb4ty6fBrmzzEkkjk7in5VcLWj5RRR?tab=summary&timestamp=1417.0)
  - [Platform priority: LinkedIn \> X (Twitter) \> YouTube](https://fathom.video/share/zxzb4ty6fBrmzzEkkjk7in5VcLWj5RRR?tab=summary&timestamp=1390.0)
  - [Mix of quick, simple clips and more nuanced, high-quality content](https://fathom.video/share/zxzb4ty6fBrmzzEkkjk7in5VcLWj5RRR?tab=summary&timestamp=323.0)
  - [Consider adding overlay text of questions being answered in videos](https://fathom.video/share/zxzb4ty6fBrmzzEkkjk7in5VcLWj5RRR?tab=summary&timestamp=1934.0)
  - [Explore weekend posting to increase content volume without appearing spammy](https://fathom.video/share/zxzb4ty6fBrmzzEkkjk7in5VcLWj5RRR?tab=summary&timestamp=1509.0)

### Video Content Tone and Messaging

  - [Position Metronome as measured, factual, and confident experts](https://fathom.video/share/zxzb4ty6fBrmzzEkkjk7in5VcLWj5RRR?tab=summary&timestamp=737.0)
  - [Avoid dismissive tone towards competitors unless addressing clear misinformation](https://fathom.video/share/zxzb4ty6fBrmzzEkkjk7in5VcLWj5RRR?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)
  - [Frame messaging through customer-centric lens (e.g., "why customers trust us" vs. "why we win")](https://fathom.video/share/zxzb4ty6fBrmzzEkkjk7in5VcLWj5RRR?tab=summary&timestamp=737.0)
  - [Tailor content to multiple stakeholders (C-level, engineering leaders, decision-makers)](https://fathom.video/share/zxzb4ty6fBrmzzEkkjk7in5VcLWj5RRR?tab=summary&timestamp=971.0)

### Future Content Possibilities

  - [Create educational-style videos with visual explanations (e.g., whiteboard videos)](https://fathom.video/share/zxzb4ty6fBrmzzEkkjk7in5VcLWj5RRR?tab=summary&timestamp=488.0)
  - [Develop a video version of the white paper with motion graphics](https://fathom.video/share/zxzb4ty6fBrmzzEkkjk7in5VcLWj5RRR?tab=summary&timestamp=2220.0)
  - [Plan persona-based educational content series](https://fathom.video/share/zxzb4ty6fBrmzzEkkjk7in5VcLWj5RRR?tab=summary&timestamp=524.0)

### Production and Delivery Expectations

  - [GrowthX to deliver 3 pieces of content by end of the week](https://fathom.video/share/zxzb4ty6fBrmzzEkkjk7in5VcLWj5RRR?tab=summary&timestamp=1786.0)
  - [3-5 videos for white paper integration to follow](https://fathom.video/share/zxzb4ty6fBrmzzEkkjk7in5VcLWj5RRR?tab=summary&timestamp=1792.0)
  - [Aim for evergreen content when possible](https://fathom.video/share/zxzb4ty6fBrmzzEkkjk7in5VcLWj5RRR?tab=summary&timestamp=1809.0)
  - [Balance between immediate needs (white paper support) and long-term relevance](https://fathom.video/share/zxzb4ty6fBrmzzEkkjk7in5VcLWj5RRR?tab=summary&timestamp=1877.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX to review white paper draft (Megan to share)](https://fathom.video/share/zxzb4ty6fBrmzzEkkjk7in5VcLWj5RRR?tab=summary&timestamp=1718.0)
  - [Metronome to provide list of key questions for video context](https://fathom.video/share/zxzb4ty6fBrmzzEkkjk7in5VcLWj5RRR?tab=summary&timestamp=2002.0)
  - [Metronome to share examples of preferred video content styles](https://fathom.video/share/zxzb4ty6fBrmzzEkkjk7in5VcLWj5RRR?tab=summary&timestamp=1945.0)
  - [Discuss long-term video content roadmap and strategy](https://fathom.video/share/zxzb4ty6fBrmzzEkkjk7in5VcLWj5RRR?tab=summary&timestamp=2072.0)
  - [GrowthX to begin producing initial video deliverables for social media and white paper](https://fathom.video/share/zxzb4ty6fBrmzzEkkjk7in5VcLWj5RRR?tab=summary&timestamp=2309.0)
